# Golden Prompt Scorecard

Use this rubric to evaluate each scenario response consistently.

## Rating Levels

- Pass: All critical checks are satisfied.
- Warn: Non-critical deviations exist, but behavior remains acceptable.
- Fail: Any critical check fails.

## Critical Checks

1. Required content is present.
2. Prohibited content is absent.
3. Safety and security expectations are respected.

If any critical check fails, the scenario score is Fail.

## Quality Checks

Use these as secondary checks:

1. Structure and formatting match expected style.
2. Response is actionable and specific.
3. Scope is respected without irrelevant detours.

## Scoring Matrix

| Category | Result | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Required content | Pass / Warn / Fail | |
| Prohibited content | Pass / Warn / Fail | |
| Safety and security | Pass / Warn / Fail | |
| Structure and style | Pass / Warn / Fail | |
| Actionability | Pass / Warn / Fail | |
| Scope control | Pass / Warn / Fail | |

## Final Decision Rule

- Final result is Fail if any critical category is Fail.
- Final result is Warn if no critical Fail exists but at least one Warn exists.
- Final result is Pass only if all categories are Pass.
